channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg faces a jury today. And, the top DHS spokesperson resigns her post
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg takes the stand today in a trial over whether social media companies are fueling the teen mental health crisis. And, Tricia McLaughlin...

item.title: 'Let them shower in hotels': Johannesburg Premier faces backlash amid water crisis
item.description: In South Africa, as taps run dry in Johannesburg, Africa's richest city, a tone deaf remark by a senior politician there unleashes fury.

item.title: Sweet redemption for Mikaela Shiffrin, who wins Olympic gold
item.description: Third race is the charm for Shiffrin, who won gold today after failing to podium in her first two races of the 2026 Olympic Games.

item.title: Ogden, Schumacher grab silver for U.S. in Olympic cross-country team sprint, Diggins falls short
item.description: U.S. cross-country skiers Ben Ogden and Gus Schumacher power to a silver medal in the men's team sprint. U.S. women led by Jessie Diggins finish off t...

item.title: Greetings from Cairo, where lights and decorations transform the city during Ramadan
item.description: As Ramadan begins, traditional lanterns called fawanees brighten Cairo. They have become a symbol of Ramadan and are an almost-mandatory home decorati...

item.title: Late-night host Stephen Colbert isn’t backing down from public dispute with CBS bosses
item.description: Colbert said that he was surprised by a network statement that denied Colbert had been told he couldn’t air an interview with a Texas Senate candidate...

item.title: Kana emerges from stealth with $15M to build flexible AI agents for marketers
item.description: Kana, a new AI marketing startup from the founders of Rapt and Krux, has raised $15 million to build customizable, agent-based marketing tools.

item.title: Snapchat+ tops 25M subscribers, driving company’s direct revenue ARR to $1B
item.description: The revenue milestone comes as Snap has added additional paid offerings outside of its core Snapchat+ subscription over the past year to diversify its...

item.title: Google adds music generation capabilities to the Gemini app
item.description: Users will be able to use text, images, and videos as a reference to generate music

item.title: How Democrats are feeling about their party, according to a new AP-NORC poll
Single-Family vs. Multifamily Rentals: Which Is the Best First Rental?
item.description: Single-family vs. multifamily rental properties—which gets you to financial freedom faster? A rookie real estate investor is wondering what he should ...

item.title: This former Microsoft PM thinks she can unseat CyberArk in 18 months
item.description: Though crowded, the identity management market seems eager for new solutions, and Venice is finding traction.

item.title: How to Buy Your First (or Next) Rental Property in 2026 (Step by Step)
item.description: Want to buy your first rental property in 2026? You’ve come to the right place! Whether you dream of becoming a “small and mighty” investor or buildin...

item.title: Crews search for 9 skiers missing after California avalanche near Lake Tahoe
Microsoft says Office bug exposed customers’ confidential emails to Copilot AI
item.description: Microsoft said the bug meant that its Copilot AI chatbot was reading and summarizing paying customers' confidential emails, bypassing data protection ...

item.title: Why Thousands Are Flocking to North Carolina’s Explosive Real Estate and Job Market
item.description: “Follow the money” is cogent advice for investors deciding which Sunbelt state to invest in. Unlike in previous years, however, the money trail leads ...

item.title: How to Buy Five Short-Term Rentals in Five Years
item.description: Everyone hears “five Airbnbs in five years” and immediately pictures some kind of motivational speaker montage. You know the one: And then year two hi...

item.title: 2026 Mortgage Update: Lower Rates, ARMs Return, and When to Refi
item.description: Rental property financing is becoming much easier. For years, seven and eight-percent rates made it brutal to make deals work. But now, things are cha...
